case_title: MARTINEZ, MERCEDES J. VS VICTORIO MELODIA MRS. et al

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VICTORIO MELODIA MRS.
